title: Repository Organization Move
summary: Decision and two-phase plan to transfer the specgraph repo to the specgraph GitHub org and update all module/import references.
notes: Filename lives under specs/ with a '-design' suffix (SPEC-like path) but content structure is Status/Problem/Decision typical of ADRs, lacking a Consequences section. Classified as ADR (Status: Approved = locked) due to explicit Decision statement outranking the ambiguous path signal.
